creator: william.franck@ocealog.com
text:
Have the same problem with 7.1(no scsi card).
either : reboot , either the loader -or- loader.4th went in a blocked  
state. (have to reboot)

Found a workaround by editing loader.rc and commented the 'start'  
command.
Drawback : no tuning possible through the 'loader.conf' files :(


Was 100% functionnal with 6.2
Will have a try with 6.2 loader.
Chears, William
